data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the presence of verification rows with specific metadata, but the provided evidence does not include any details or records of such verification rows. The linked use case mentions the need for these rows, but there is no evidence presented that confirms their existence or compliance with the requirement. This indicates a clear gap in the evidence provided, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of verification rows with verifier biz/provider metadata.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
